Purpose: Enforce silent BitLocker encryption on all corporate Windows 11 devices to meet ISO 27001 data-at-rest requirements
Scope: Windows Kios devices
Owner: Jannik Reinhard — Epic Fusion, reviewed quarterly
Last reviewed: 2025-01-15 — JIRA-4521 — changed min PIN length from 4 to 6 digits
Uses lapsadmin created via custom OMA-URI policy
Turn off notifications evenings and weekends
